text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Tee-hee! ♪ I've got me the good<n>stuff! Nothing to
worry about with this<n>lucky charm on hand...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, hold up! If memory serves,<n>there's a
mischievous cat lurking<n>around here. I need to
keep this safe<n>so it doesn't get stolen...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: You little devil! Get back here!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Not only does Matikanefukukitaru fail<n>to retrieve
her charm, but she walks<n>away from the ordeal
completely<n>exhausted.
